where_to_eat.name: Checkers/Sixty60
where_to_eat.description: Popular grocery delivery service and supermarket chain with convenient shopping options throughout Cape Town. Known for fast delivery and reliable service.

into_the_wild.name: Table Mountain
into_the_wild.description: Iconic mountain landmark and one of Cape Town's most recognizable natural features. A must-see destination offering spectacular views of the city and surrounding areas.

into_the_wild.name: Cape of Good Hope
into_the_wild.description: Historic and scenic coastal point offering stunning ocean vistas and important historical significance. Part of a popular full-day trip from Cape Town.

into_the_wild.name: Boulders Beach
into_the_wild.description: Beautiful beach known for its distinctive boulder formations and marine life. A scenic stop often included in Cape Town day trips and outdoor explorations.

into_the_wild.name: Seal Island
into_the_wild.description: Marine wildlife destination where visitors can observe seals and experience the natural beauty of False Bay. Often visited as part of Cape Town's outdoor adventure activities.

into_the_wild.name: False Bay / Kalk Bay Harbour
into_the_wild.description: Picturesque coastal area home to diverse marine life including fur seals and the famous orcas Port and Starboard. Great for wildlife viewing and experiencing local harbour charm.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Table Mountain at Night
gram_worthy_spots.description: Cape Town's iconic peak creates stunning cyberpunk-like aesthetics at night with atmospheric lighting. Perfect for dramatic and moody photography with the city as backdrop.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Kalk Bay Harbour
gram_worthy_spots.description: Charming local harbour with picturesque views of boats and coastal scenery. Great location for capturing authentic Cape Town maritime culture and ocean vistas.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Gordon's Bay
off_the_beaten_path.description: Coastal spot where visitors can encounter unique wildlife and experience nature close to the city. Known for seal sightings and authentic local beach atmosphere.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Local Parks (Parks outside bed and breakfast areas)
off_the_beaten_path.description: Parks accessible from various accommodation options throughout Cape Town offering peaceful outdoor spaces for exploration and relaxation away from major tourist crowds.
